note: clean: clear letterhead + contract language + date
clean: clear technical report; date is month-year -> GT = 1st of month by convention
clean: financial statement; two dates (fiscal end + issue) — GT = issue date
HARD ambiguous company: names TWO entities. GT=issuer (Aktor Construction)
HARD UNKNOWN: names only an unlisted foreign subsidiary -> not in company list
HARD no date: document has NO date anywhere -> GT date empty
HARD junk/OTHER: fragmentary handwritten-style notes, no company, no date, unclassifiable
HARD date confusion: multiple dates + case numbers (218/2022, 1157/2021, hearing 14/10/2024). GT = filing date 2024-03-03
HARD ambiguous type: 'summary of invoices' -> borderline invoice vs financial_statement. GT=financial_statement
HARD UNKNOWN: external law firm letter, no Aktor entity named as owner
